_meta.epistemics_warning: Observational findings, not ground truth. Re-validate on new checkpoints / ORT versions / EPs before relying on a finding to skip work.

findings.title: Short, falsifiable claim — 1 sentence
findings.observation: What you ran, what you saw, with concrete numbers. Include model id, recipe path, precision, EP, ORT version, date.
findings.mechanism_notes: Hypothesis only — what would falsify it.
